BackstoryDef.title: Moth farmer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent most of [PAWN_objective] life working on their family farm, raising and breeding Silkmoths.[PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with taking the large bolts of fragile and expensive bolts of silk and selling it in large public markets, constantly trying to be louder and more attractive than the competition all around [PAWN_objective].
